description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with a two-tone color scheme, featuring a black upper receiver and a light gray lower receiver and grip. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, a suppressor attached to the barrel, and a vertical foregrip accessory. The top rail supports a compact red dot sight for quick target acquisition. The asset is shown partially disassembled, with the magazine, foregrip, and suppressor separated from the main body, revealing a single rifle cartridge. The overall design is compact and tactical, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A compact, two-tone bullpup rifle with a suppressor, red dot sight, detachable magazine, and vertical foregrip, shown partially disassembled.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, with the suppressor, magazine, and foregrip separated and clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the back of the rifle, the magazine well, and the separated suppressor and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's left profile, with the magazine and foregrip placed in front and the suppressor detached.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the muzzle, suppressor, and the arrangement of the separated components including the magazine and foregrip.
